member.name: T:Origam.Composer.Strings
member.summary: A strongly-typed resource class, for looking up localized strings, etc.

member.name: P:Origam.Composer.Strings.ResourceManager
member.summary: Returns the cached ResourceManager instance used by this class.

member.name: P:Origam.Composer.Strings.Culture
member.summary: Overrides the current thread's CurrentUICulture property for all resource lookups using this strongly typed resource class.

member.name: P:Origam.Composer.Strings.Actions_to_be_performed
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to [bold]Actions to be performed[/].

member.name: P:Origam.Composer.Strings.All_steps_completed
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to [orange1]All steps completed. Bye![/].

member.name: P:Origam.Composer.Strings.Architect_Configuration_Header
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to [purple]Architect Configuration[/].

member.name: P:Origam.Composer.Strings.BuilderTask_Create_database_new_empty
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Create database (new empty).

member.name: P:Origam.Composer.Strings.BuilderTask_Create_database_structure_from_model
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Create database structure (from model).

member.name: P:Origam.Composer.Strings.BuilderTask_Create_Docker_run_scripts
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Create Docker run scripts.

member.name: P:Origam.Composer.Strings.BuilderTask_Create_new_Admin_user
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Create new Admin user (Client web application).

member.name: P:Origam.Composer.Strings.BuilderTask_Create_new_Package
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Create new Package.

member.name: P:Origam.Composer.Strings.BuilderTask_Initialize_Git
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Initialize Git.

member.name: P:Origam.Composer.Strings.BuilderTask_Print_Settings_object
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Print OrigamSettings xml object.

member.name: P:Origam.Composer.Strings.Cannot_be_null_or_empty
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Cannot be null or empty.

member.name: P:Origam.Composer.Strings.Create_New_Project
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Create New Project.

member.name: P:Origam.Composer.Strings.Database_Configuration_Header
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to [blue]Database Configuration[/].

member.name: P:Origam.Composer.Strings.Executing_task
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to [orange1][bold]Executing:[/][/] {0}.

member.name: P:Origam.Composer.Strings.Git_config_set
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to [orange1][bold]- git config set:[/][/] {0}, {1}.

member.name: P:Origam.Composer.Strings.Git_Configuration_Header
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to [cyan1]Git Configuration[/].

member.name: P:Origam.Composer.Strings.Init_commit_message
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to [orange1][bold]- init commit:[/][/] {0}.

member.name: P:Origam.Composer.Strings.Initial_commit
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Initial commit.

member.name: P:Origam.Composer.Strings.Model_root_directory_not_found
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Model root directory not found at: {0}.

member.name: P:Origam.Composer.Strings.Project_Configuration_Header
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to [green]Project Configuration[/].

member.name: P:Origam.Composer.Strings.Project_Creation_Tasks_Header
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to [orange1]Project Creation Tasks[/].

member.name: P:Origam.Composer.Strings.Repository_already_exists
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Repository already exists at '{0}'.

member.name: P:Origam.Composer.Strings.Repository_created
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to [orange1][bold]- repository created:[/][/] {0}.

member.name: P:Origam.Composer.Strings.Repository_not_initialized
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Repository is not initialized.

member.name: P:Origam.Composer.Strings.RepositoryZipPath_not_set
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to RepositoryZipPath is not set..

member.name: P:Origam.Composer.Strings.Source_directory_not_found
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Source directory not found: {0}.

member.name: P:Origam.Composer.Strings.Sources_folder_already_exists
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Sources folder {0} already exists and is not empty..
